creator: drtr0jan@yandex.ru
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #4)

- The OSS versions did not receive any security related changes to it. But codebase is common for OSS and Enterprise.
- The inclusion of "Fixes CVE-2022-29170" in the codebase release notes is correct.

I think, it isn't needed to commit new version to www/grafana8.
